name: 32-kali bridal lehenga
description:
32-kali bridal lehenga crafted in rich silk and georgette with full flare, highlighted with gotta patti detailing on each panel and finished with a heavy gotta & lace border at the hem. 

Lehenga includes soft lining and double can-can for enhanced volume and graceful fall. 

Blouse made in matching fabric featuring intricate hand embroidery (zari, sequins) on neckline, sleeves, and back with tailored finishing. 

Dupatta in organza adorned with gotta patti border on all four sides, elegant lace edging. 

Overall ensemble offers a traditional bridal look with coordinated gotta and lace work across lehenga and dupatta for a rich, cohesive finish.

studio.name: Khushi Chauhan Designer Studio
